metadata.description: A collection of Agent Skills for AI assistants

plugins.name: everything-search
plugins.description: [Windows only] Instant file search powered by Everything (voidtools). Find any file by name, extension, size, date, or path in milliseconds.

plugins.name: patent-builder
plugins.description: Discovers patentable ideas, refines early concepts, analyzes implementations for patent potential, and drafts patent disclosure materials. Supports Chinese and English.

plugins.name: content-to-bilingual-video
plugins.description: Turns articles, web pages, HTML, PDFs, X/Twitter posts, or pasted text into reusable Markdown knowledge assets and polished bilingual explainer videos with scene-wise narration, subtitle burn-in, and delivery verification. Supports Chinese and English workflows.
